title: Is This The FASTEST AI Model In The World?!! (Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed)
summary: Xiaomi and TileRT released MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model achieving over 1,000 tokens-per-second throughput on standard hardware. The architecture combines selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and TileRT persistent GPU kernel runtime to eliminate inference bottlenecks.
writeup: Better Stack examines MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model from Xiaomi and TileRT that reports over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The video breaks down the three components behind that throughput: selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and the TileRT persistent GPU kernel runtime, each aimed at removing inference bottlenecks. The takeaway is a concrete case study in how architecture and runtime choices, rather than raw model size alone, drive serving speed.
